entries.story: As a project manager, I want to view projects for each department in the general projects overview
As a project manager, I want to create new projects so that planning and collaboration can be centered around a specific goal
As a project manager, I want to archive projects that have been completed, so that completed projects do not clutter up the project overview
As a team member, I want to view active projects in my personal view, so that I have an organized overview of my ongoing projects
As a project manager, I want to create milestones with a due date so that projects are divided into manageable, time-bound partitions
As a project manager, I want to edit milestone due dates so that any mistakes or changes to these dates can be implemented
As a project manager, I want to be able to delete milestones
As a project manager, I want to change the status of a milestone so that the relative position of these milestones to the current progress can be accurately tracked
As a project manager, I want to filter on a specific milestone so that I can have a comprehensive overview of only the content that relates to this specific milestone
As a project manager, I want an indication of new messages and file access requests so that I am aware of new activity that needs my attention
As a project manager, I want to be able to view upcoming milestones in the project overview
As a project manager, I want to add files to a delivery while creating a delivery so that clients will be informed of the team’s results
As a project manager, I want to delete files from a delivery while creating a delivery so clients will receive the correct files
As a project manager, I want to add a description of the feedback goal to a delivery while creating the delivery so that it will be clear for clients on which areas feedback is needed
As a project manager, I want to save a delivery as a concept so that this delivery can be published later
As a project manager, I want to publish a delivery so that clients will be aware of the project’s progress
As a client, I want to view the goal description of a delivery so that I have some idea of what kind of feedback is expected
As a client, I want to access the files that are associated with the delivery so that I can base my feedback on these deliverables
As a project manager, I want to add a file to the file management so that this can be easily found by the team
As a project manager, I want to delete a file from file management so that accidentally added files do not clutter up the file management
As a project manager, I want to open a file in the dedicated desktop app
As a project manager, I want to open a file in the online editor associated with that file
As a project manager, I want to view the file archive so that I can find previous versions of files
As a project manager, I want to rename a file so that filenames can be adjusted to properly describe the file
As a project manager, I want to filter on file type to quickly find the type of file that I am looking for
As a project manager, I want to search files so that I can quickly find specific files
As a project manager, I want to sort files so that I can quickly find files based on specific attributes
As a project manager, I want to handle file access requests so that file access is restricted to the appropriate users
As a team member, I want to view files for each project in a personal overview
As a team member, I want to have access to files that belong to a task assigned to me, so that I can edit the file
As a team member, I want to be able to request access to files that I do not have access to
As a team member, I want to be able to view (not edit) files that do not belong to tasks assigned to me
As a project manager, I want to view project resource statistics so that I can keep track of the available resources
As a project manager, I want to edit the thresholds of available resources to account for changes in budget allocations
As a project manager, I want to create a new task so that work can be split up into actionable parts
As a project manager, I want to add a file to a task
As a project manager, I want to delete files from a task so that unneeded files for that task do not clutter up the workspace
As a project manager, I want to assign a team member to a task so that it is clear for the team member they are responsible to handle this work
As a project manager, I want to delete a team member from a task so that team members do not have unnecessary access to the task and its related files
As a project manager, I want to add a due date to a task
As an employee, I want to add a to do item to a task so that project work can be further split up to the smallest possible unit of work
As a project manager, I want to delete a to do item from a task so that any errors can be corrected if needed
As a project manager, I want to categorize tasks into either to-do, doing, review or done so that individual task progress in the project can be tracked
As a team member, I want to view the details of a task that I am assigned to
As an employee, I want to add a comment to a task
As a team member, I want to view my upcoming tasks in my personal overview, so that I can start working on those immediately when my day starts
As a team member, I want to be able to mark a subtask as completed so that it is clear when a it does not need my attention anymore
As a team member, I want to be able to view archived messages in past milestones, so that I can retrieve past information and maintain context
As a team member, I want to be able to send chat messages so that I can communicate with my fellow team members on project related issues
As a team member, I want to be able to view chat messages of other team members in the general chat
As a team member, I want to be able to view the chat for each specific project
As a project manager, I want to provide feedback on a task so that I can assess the work of team members
As a team member, I want to view feedback that was given on a task, so that I can process the given feedback
As a client, I want to rate a delivery on several criteria on a five-point scale
As a client, I want to insert textual feedback on several criteria in a delivery
As a client, I want to save feedback on a delivery as a concept so that this delivery can be published later
As a client, I want to publish feedback on a delivery so that the responsible project team can improve my product

entries.story: As a project manager, I want to view projects for each department in the general projects overview
As a project manager, I want to create new projects so that planning and collaboration can be centered around a specific goal
As a project manager, I want to archive projects that have been completed, so that completed projects do not clutter up the project overview
As a team member, I want to view active projects in my personal view, so that I have an organized overview of my ongoing projects
As a project manager, I want to create milestones with a due date so that projects are divided into manageable, time-bound partitions
As a project manager, I want to edit milestone due dates so that any mistakes or changes to these dates can be implemented
As a project manager, I want to be able to delete milestones
As a project manager, I want to change the status of a milestone so that the relative position of these milestones to the current progress can be accurately tracked
As a project manager, I want to filter on a specific milestone so that I can have a comprehensive overview of only the content that relates to this specific milestone
As a project manager, I want an indication of new messages and file access requests so that I am aware of new activity that needs my attention
As a project manager, I want to be able to view upcoming milestones in the project overview
As a project manager, I want to add files to a delivery while creating a delivery so that clients will be informed of the team’s results
As a project manager, I want to delete files from a delivery while creating a delivery so clients will receive the correct files
As a project manager, I want to add a description of the feedback goal to a delivery while creating the delivery so that it will be clear for clients on which areas feedback is needed
As a project manager, I want to save a delivery as a concept so that this delivery can be published later
As a project manager, I want to publish a delivery so that clients will be aware of the project’s progress
As a client, I want to view the goal description of a delivery so that I have some idea of what kind of feedback is expected
As a client, I want to access the files that are associated with the delivery so that I can base my feedback on these deliverables
As a project manager, I want to add a file to the file management so that this can be easily found by the team
As a project manager, I want to delete a file from file management so that accidentally added files do not clutter up the file management
As a project manager, I want to open a file in the dedicated desktop app
As a project manager, I want to open a file in the online editor associated with that file
As a project manager, I want to view the file archive so that I can find previous versions of files
As a project manager, I want to rename a file so that filenames can be adjusted to properly describe the file
As a project manager, I want to filter on file type to quickly find the type of file that I am looking for
As a project manager, I want to search files so that I can quickly find specific files
As a project manager, I want to sort files so that I can quickly find files based on specific attributes
As a project manager, I want to handle file access requests so that file access is restricted to the appropriate users
As a team member, I want to view files for each project in a personal overview
As a team member, I want to have access to files that belong to a task assigned to me, so that I can edit the file
As a team member, I want to be able to request access to files that I do not have access to
As a team member, I want to be able to view (not edit) files that do not belong to tasks assigned to me
As a project manager, I want to view project resource statistics so that I can keep track of the available resources
As a project manager, I want to edit the thresholds of available resources to account for changes in budget allocations
As a project manager, I want to create a new task so that work can be split up into actionable parts
As a project manager, I want to add a file to a task
As a project manager, I want to delete files from a task so that unneeded files for that task do not clutter up the workspace
As a project manager, I want to assign a team member to a task so that it is clear for the team member they are responsible to handle this work
As a project manager, I want to delete a team member from a task so that team members do not have unnecessary access to the task and its related files
As a project manager, I want to add a due date to a task
As an employee, I want to add a to do item to a task so that project work can be further split up to the smallest possible unit of work
As a project manager, I want to delete a to do item from a task so that any errors can be corrected if needed
As a project manager, I want to categorize tasks into either to-do, doing, review or done so that individual task progress in the project can be tracked
As a team member, I want to view the details of a task that I am assigned to
As an employee, I want to add a comment to a task
As a team member, I want to view my upcoming tasks in my personal overview, so that I can start working on those immediately when my day starts
As a team member, I want to be able to mark a subtask as completed so that it is clear when a it does not need my attention anymore
As a team member, I want to be able to view archived messages in past milestones, so that I can retrieve past information and maintain context
As a team member, I want to be able to send chat messages so that I can communicate with my fellow team members on project related issues
As a team member, I want to be able to view chat messages of other team members in the general chat
As a team member, I want to be able to view the chat for each specific project
As a project manager, I want to provide feedback on a task so that I can assess the work of team members
As a team member, I want to view feedback that was given on a task, so that I can process the given feedback
As a client, I want to rate a delivery on several criteria on a five-point scale
As a client, I want to insert textual feedback on several criteria in a delivery
As a client, I want to save feedback on a delivery as a concept so that this delivery can be published later
As a client, I want to publish feedback on a delivery so that the responsible project team can improve my product
